jsonLd.title: Junior SEO Specialist at FabAlley
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with FabAlley! We are hiring a SEO Specialist for our Dhanbad team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About FabAlley:
FabAlley is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Develop and implement category growth strategies

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in Digital Marketing
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in A/B Testing
• Proficiency in Customer Segmentation
• Proficiency in WooCommerce
• Proficiency in CRM Software

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Dhanbad, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with FabAlley!
